From: dave.chen@ssc-spc.gc.ca
To: alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Cc: carol.nguyen@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: Opportunity: Wi-Fi Infrastructure Upgrade During Network Migration
Date: March 7, 2026

Alice, Carol,

While reviewing the network migration plan for Site A, I wanted to flag
an opportunity that I think we should discuss with the steering committee.

Given that our contractors will already be on-site and the network
infrastructure will be partially disrupted during the Catalyst 9500
switch deployment, this would be an ideal time to also upgrade the
Wi-Fi access points across all three data centre facilities.

Currently, Sites A, B, and C are running Cisco Aironet 2800 series
access points that are approaching end-of-support (EOL: June 2026).
Upgrading to the Catalyst 9120 series during the same migration window
would avoid a separate disruptive maintenance activity later in the year
and could deliver 40% better wireless throughput in the server rooms.

Estimated additional cost: $85,000–$110,000.
Timeline impact: 3 additional days per site (9 days total).

I've already spoken informally with TechSupplier and they can include
the access points in the same delivery. Could we add this to the scope
and get steering committee approval before the March 18 window?

Let me know your thoughts.

Dave Chen
Security and Infrastructure Specialist, NGIS Phase 3
